sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
seg = current_frame.segmentation

# Find orange square
o_sq = [n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'O' and n['pixels'] > 15]
print("Orange objects:")
for o in seg['nodes']:
    if o['color'] == 'O':
        cr = sum(x[0] for x in o['boundary']) / len(o['boundary'])
        cc = sum(x[1] for x in o['boundary']) / len(o['boundary'])
        print(f"  ({cr:.0f},{cc:.0f}) pixels={o['pixels']}")

# Find white objects
print("\nWhite objects:")
for w in sorted(seg['nodes'], key=lambda n: sum(p[1] for p in n['boundary'])/len(n['boundary'])):
    if w['color'] == 'w':
        wc = sum(p[0] for p in w['boundary']) / len(w['boundary']), sum(p[1] for p in w['boundary']) / len(w['boundary'])
        print(f"  ({wc[0]:.0f},{wc[1]:.0f}) pixels={w['pixels']}")

# Find purple square
p_sq = [n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'p' and n['pixels'] > 10]
if p_sq:
    cr = sum(x[0] for x in p_sq[0]['boundary']) / len(p_sq[0]['boundary'])
    cc = sum(x[1] for x in p_sq[0]['boundary']) / len(p_sq[0]['boundary'])
    print(f"\nPurple square at ({cr:.0f},{cc:.0f})")

# Compare to previous frame
if previous_frame:
    prev_seg = previous_frame.segmentation
    prev_o = [n for n in prev_seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'O' and n['pixels'] > 15]
    if prev_o:
        cr = sum(x[0] for x in prev_o[0]['boundary']) / len(prev_o[0]['boundary'])
        cc = sum(x[1] for x in prev_o[0]['boundary']) / len(prev_o[0]['boundary'])
        print(f"\nPrevious orange at ({cr:.0f},{cc:.0f})")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
